WHAT WE DO

Tile & stone restoration, done right.

We specialize in cleaning and restoring — nothing more, nothing less. That focus is why the work holds up.

01

Pool Tile Cleaning

Waterline calcium and scale removed from spa & pool tile without harming glaze, grout or finish.

02

Fountain Cleaning

Tiered fountains, basins and water features stripped of algae, mineral crust and stains.

03

Calcium & Scale Removal

Heavy, years-deep buildup broken down safely with abrasive media — not harsh acid.

04

& More

Decorative stone, water features and hardscape restoration — ask us what you're dealing with.

What we don't do: we don't repair grout and we don't install or replace tile. We clean and restore what's already there — for grout repair or new tile, we're happy to point you to someone we trust.
HOW IT WORKS

Three visits' worth of work, in one.

STEP 01

Free Walkthrough & Quote

We look at what you're dealing with in person, explain what media-blasting can and can't do, and give you a straight price — no surprises.

STEP 02

Media-Blasting

Fine abrasive media strips calcium and grime off the tile surface without cracking glaze or eating into your grout lines.

STEP 03

Rinse & Walkthrough

We rinse everything down, inspect the full line, and walk it with you before we call the job done.

WHO WE ARE

We're part of this community — not just working in it.

Godfrey's Tile Works isn't trying to get rich. We're here to give hardworking families in this community honest, quality work at a fair price — the kind of work we'd want done on our own pool.

We show up, we do the job right, and we stand behind it. If you're not happy with the result, tell us and we'll make it right. That's the whole business model.

QUESTIONS

Good to know before we show up.

Will media-blasting damage my tile or grout?+
No — that's the whole point of the method. We use fine abrasive media calibrated to lift calcium and scale off the tile surface without harming the glaze or eating into grout lines, unlike acid washing.
Do you repair grout or install new tile?+
No — we intentionally stay focused on cleaning and restoration only. If your job needs grout repair or new tile, we'll point you to someone we trust for that part.
How long does a typical job take?+
Most residential pool tile lines are done in a single visit. Fountains and heavier calcium buildup may take a bit longer — we'll give you a real estimate at the free walkthrough.
Do I need to drain my pool?+
Usually no for waterline tile cleaning. We'll tell you upfront during the walkthrough if your specific job needs the water level dropped.
What areas do you serve?+
We serve the local Central Valley community. Not sure if you're in range? Call (559) 567-1460 and ask — it takes one minute.
